entries.summary: Slack surface records coordination artifacts as bridge-owned outputs.
Chronos surface records coordination artifacts as gateway-owned outputs.
Presence requests and notifications are stored as runtime-owned artifacts.
Terminal/CLI surface records coordination artifacts under the mission-controller identity that issued the mission (SN-01).
Telegram surface records coordination artifacts under the shared surface runtime identity.
iMessage surface records coordination artifacts under the shared surface runtime identity.
Discord surface records coordination artifacts under the shared surface runtime identity.
